items.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
items.summary: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

items.title: Mars Liyao Gao, Yuxuan Bao, Amy S. Rude, Xinwei Shen, J. Nathan Kutz
Quoting Kyle Daigle
items.summary:
[GitHub] platform activity is surging. There were 1 billion commits in 2025. Now, it's 275 million per week, on pace for 14 billion this year if growth remains linear (spoiler: it won't.)
GitHub Actions has grown from 500M minutes/week in 2023 to 1B minutes/week in 2025, and now 2.1B minutes so far this week.
— Kyle Daigle, COO, GitHub

    Tags: github, github-actions
